task.title: Kafka Event Consumer
task.description: Implement Kafka consumer with Effect Stream for processing notification events

implementation.details:
1. Add kafkajs with Effect Stream adapter
2. Subscribe to notifications.created topic
3. Process events through integration services
4. Implement backpressure handling
5. Add consumer group management

task.acceptance_criteria: Consumer processes Kafka events, routes to appropriate integration services, handles backpressure gracefully
